general.language_desc: Select the display language for the extension interface.
general.theme_desc: Choose the preferred color theme for the extension interface.
general.accent_color_desc: Customize the primary theme color used throughout the interface. Choose a preset or pick your own color.
general.button_position_desc: Choose where the download button appears on GitHub repository pages.
general.show_file_sizes_desc: Display file size information next to each file in repository listings.
general.double_click_select_desc: Enable double-clicking on file or folder rows to toggle selection.

download.zip_naming_rule_desc: Define the filename format for the downloaded ZIP archive. You can choose a preset or type a custom name.
download.quick_presets_desc: Instantly load predefined filter combinations for different scenarios.
download.common_group_desc: Commonly ignored files and folders for developers.
download.media_group_desc: Large asset files or documentation to optionally ignore.
download.custom_rules_desc: Add your own wildcard patterns. E.g., {code1} for files, {code2} for folders.
download.show_notification_desc: Display a browser popup when the download completes.
download.play_sound_desc: Play a short "ding" chime when the download completes.
download.open_folder_desc: Automatically open the OS save folder when the download completes.

history.empty_desc: When you download files from GitHub repositories, your download history will appear here.
history.clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all download history? This action cannot be undone.
history.filtered_out_desc: {count} {count, plural, one {file was} other {files were}} excluded based on your auto‑ignore settings.

stats.calculated_from: Calculated from the current filtered history dataset.

token.api_access_desc: Choose how GitZip Pro accesses GitHub API:
token.api_access_desc_li_1: Anonymous Access: Uses public API without authentication (rate limited to 60 requests per hour)
token.api_access_desc_li_2: Custom Token: Use your personal GitHub token for higher rate limits and access to private repositories
token.anonymous_warning_limitation: Limitations: Only 60 requests per hour shared with all other users on your network. This is very likely to be exhausted quickly.
token.anonymous_warning_recommendation: Recommendation: Create a free Personal Access Token to get 5000 requests per hour, and access your private repositories.
token.token_scope_private: Current token type: Public + Private repositories.
token.token_scope_public: Current token type: Public repositories only.
token.token_scope_unknown: Current token type: Custom token (scope unknown).
token.token_input_desc: You can either manually enter your GitHub Personal Access Token, or click the authorization buttons below to get a token automatically via OAuth.
token.token_input_option_public: Public Repos Only: Grants access to public repositories only
token.token_input_option_full: Full Access: Grants access to both public and private repositories

about.update_downloaded: Update downloaded. The extension will be updated on next browser restart.
about.latest_version: You are using the latest version.
about.update_throttled: Update check throttled. Please try again later.
about.update_dev_mode: Update API not available in development mode.
about.star_github_desc: Support this project by starring it on GitHub.
about.report_issue_desc: Found a bug or have a feature request? Open an issue on GitHub.
about.rate_us_desc: Enjoying GitZip Pro? Leave a review on Chrome Web Store.

welcome_modal.title: Welcome to GitZip Pro! 🎉
welcome_modal.subtitle: This message will only appear once
welcome_modal.tip_desc: For the best experience, we recommend using a GitHub Personal Access Token instead of anonymous access:
welcome_modal.tip_bullet_1: Higher rate limits: 5,000 requests per hour vs 60 with anonymous access
welcome_modal.tip_bullet_2: Access private repositories: Download files from your private repos
welcome_modal.tip_bullet_3: Better reliability: Avoid hitting rate limits during large downloads
welcome_modal.footer_note: You can always change token settings later in the Token section.

popup.not_on_repo_page: Not on a repo file page

notifications.token_copied_msg: GitHub Personal Access Token copied to clipboard successfully.
notifications.copy_failed_msg: Failed to copy token to clipboard. Please try again.

downloader.all_skipped: All selected items were skipped by ignore rules ({count} item(s) excluded). Check your ignore settings if this is not intended.
